---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new provider, feature, or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it unlock?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like. If you're proposing a new provider, include:
- Which layer it belongs to (transport / discovery / persistence / observability)
- What infrastructure it depends on
- Relevant protocol or SDK documentation

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or anything else that might help.
